message:
test(ftui-widgets): add 16 proptest invariants for widget rendering

Property-based tests covering Block, List, ProgressBar, Sparkline, and
Scrollbar: inner() containment and monotonicity, chrome_size consistency,
ratio clamping, sparkline NaN/Inf resilience, list selection validity,
scrollbar position bounds, zero-area rendering safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
